title: nymphoides peltata
intro: Nymphoides peltata, also known as yellow water lily, is a flowering plant species native to Asia, Europe, and North America. The plant's rhizomes and roots are used in traditional medicine, possessing anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been shown to exhibit potential in treating various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Nymphoides peltata are believed to provide benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating joint pain, and protecting against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Nymphoides peltata include decoctions and infusions, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, and other medicinal products.
